items.name: browser-app
items.title: Editable Browser App
items.description: Browser-backed demos such as SaaS tools, internal dashboards, Airtable-like scenes, or web research workflows.

items.name: calendar-app
items.title: macOS Calendar App
items.description: Scheduling, coordination, and calendar-driven workflow scenes.

items.name: claude-agent-rail
items.title: Claude Agent Context Rail
items.description: Reusable Claude task/status sidecar for demos that need progress, context, artifacts, connectors, or working-file state without the full Claude app shell.

items.name: claude-app
items.title: Claude Working Thread
items.description: Focused Claude working-thread scenes, especially clips that pair Claude with one other app surface.

items.name: claude-attachment-draft
items.title: Claude Attached Folder Draft
items.description: Pre-submit scenes where a user has attached a local folder or files before Claude starts working.

items.name: claude-browser-chat-pane-workflow
items.title: Claude Chat Pane Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: The lightest Claude-plus-browser instructional clips: active Claude topbar, message field, and composer over a browser surface, without sidebar, task rail, Finder, Office, Codex terminal, Premiere, or the full desktop workflow.

items.name: claude-browser-chat-workflow
items.title: Claude Chat Shell Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Short instructional clips that need only Claude plus a browser surface, without importing the task rail, Finder, Office, Codex terminal, Premiere, or the full desktop workflow.

items.name: claude-browser-composed-workflow
items.title: Claude Componentized Shell Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Short clips that need a full Claude shell plus a browser app while preserving the reusable sidebar, thread core, composer, and rail as independently editable child components.

items.name: claude-browser-thread-workflow
items.title: Claude Working Thread Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Short demo clips that need only the current Claude working thread over a browser app, without Finder, PowerPoint, or the attachment-draft beat.

items.name: claude-browser-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Short demo clips that need only Claude with attached context and a browser app.

items.name: claude-chat-pane
items.title: Claude Chat Pane
items.description: Claude chat scenes that need just the active topbar, message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop chrome.

items.name: claude-chat-shell
items.title: Claude Chat Shell
items.description: Simple Claude chat demos that need a sidebar, thread, and composer without the Cowork/task rail, tool-card stack, Finder, browser, Office, Codex, or full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-cinematic-reply
items.title: Claude Cinematic Reply
items.description: Sparse launch-style Claude answer/composer beats when a clip does not need sidebar, task rail, or tool cards.

items.name: claude-code-desktop
items.title: Claude Code Desktop
items.description: Claude Code desktop clips that need the dark app shell with session rail, prompt transcript, diff, terminal, tasks, floating view menu, model state, and bottom composer without importing the warm Claude chat shell.

items.name: claude-code-figma-workflow
items.title: Claude Code Plus Figma Workflow
items.description: Claude Code-to-design clips that need the light reference-style Claude Code terminal driving a dark Figma onboarding design editor without importing the warm Claude chat shell, Finder, Office, browser, Codex terminal, Premiere, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-code-terminal-session
items.title: Claude Code Terminal Session
items.description: Small Claude Code terminal-session clips that need the light reference-style panel without importing the dark Claude Code desktop shell or the warm Claude chat shell.

items.name: claude-codex-terminal-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Codex Terminal Workflow
items.description: Instructional clips that need Claude supervising or describing work while Codex CLI executes in Terminal, without browser, Finder, Office, or full desktop surfaces.

items.name: claude-completion-response
items.title: Claude Completion Response
items.description: Cinematic Claude done-state beats that need only the large serif response and red response mark, without composer, sidebar, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, Premiere, or desktop context.

items.name: claude-composed-app
items.title: Claude Componentized App Shell
items.description: Full Claude app beats assembled from reusable child components when a video needs the shell but should still keep sidebar, thread, composer, and rail independently editable.

items.name: claude-composer
items.title: Claude Working Composer
items.description: Reusable floating Claude composer beats, especially clips that need attachment chips and running controls without the full Claude app shell.

items.name: claude-conversation
items.title: Claude Sparse Conversation Canvas
items.description: Launch-style Claude response clips that need the sparse conversation canvas without the desktop sidebar or full app shell.

items.name: claude-conversation-browser-workflow
items.title: Claude Sparse Conversation Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Launch-style clips that need a browser app being updated in the background with the sparse Claude response canvas in front.

items.name: claude-deck-chat-pane
items.title: Claude Deck Chat Pane
items.description: Claude plus PowerPoint/deck scenes that need only the active topbar, deck-focused message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Codex, or desktop chrome.

items.name: claude-excel-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Excel Workflow
items.description: Spreadsheet review, formula checking, chart-range, and workbook automation clips that need Claude with an Excel-style workbook, without browser, Finder, PowerPoint, Word, Figma, Premiere, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-figma-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Figma Workflow
items.description: Design handoff and frame-editing clips that need Claude with a Figma-style editor, without browser, Finder, Office, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-finder-thread-workflow
items.title: Claude Working Thread Plus Finder Workflow
items.description: Short file/folder workflow clips that need the refined Claude working thread with Finder context, without browser, PowerPoint, attachment draft emphasis, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-finder-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Finder Workflow
items.description: Short file/folder handoff clips that should not import browser, PowerPoint, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-home
items.title: Claude New Chat Home
items.description: Opening prompt scenes before a working Claude thread exists.

items.name: claude-home-launch
items.title: Claude Launch Prompt Stack
items.description: Full-frame launch prompt beats where a video needs the Sonnet-style user request stack without the desktop/sidebar Claude app shell.

items.name: claude-launch-browser-workflow
items.title: Claude Launch States Plus Browser Workflow
items.description: Short launch-style clips that need a browser app as the background work surface plus Claude prompt-to-completion states, without Finder, Office, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab; use `capture:claude-launch-browser-workflow-prompt` for the prompt beat.

items.name: claude-launch-completion
items.title: Claude Launch Completion
items.description: Full-frame Claude completion beats where a clip needs a launch-style done state and lower-edge Reply composer without the desktop/sidebar app shell.

items.name: claude-premiere-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Premiere Workflow
items.description: Video editing, timeline review, trim, graphics, and export clips that need Claude with a Premiere-style editor, without browser, Finder, Office, Figma, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-presentation-chat-pane-workflow
items.title: Claude Chat Pane Plus Presentation Workflow
items.description: Short deck-update clips that need Claude plus a PowerPoint-like editor, while avoiding the heavier Claude sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Codex terminal, or full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-presentation-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Presentation Workflow
items.description: Instructional clips that need Claude guiding or reporting on a deck edit with a PowerPoint-like editor, without browser, Finder, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: claude-prompt-stack
items.title: Claude Launch Prompt Stack
items.description: Cinematic Claude launch beats that need only oversized right-aligned prompt bubbles and a loading mark, without app chrome, sidebar, composer, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop context.

items.name: claude-response-mark
items.title: Claude Response Mark
items.description: Reusable editable Claude response mark for sparse launch replies, completion states, and Claude thread surfaces that need consistent mark geometry.

items.name: claude-sidebar
items.title: Claude Sidebar
items.description: Reusable Claude left navigation for videos that need workspace/task context without importing the full Claude shell.

items.name: claude-thread-core
items.title: Claude Working Thread Core
items.description: Reusable Claude transcript/tool-use pane for videos that need the active thread without sidebar, composer, task rail, or outer app window.

items.name: claude-tool-result
items.title: Claude Completed Tool Result
items.description: Post-action scenes where Claude has read files, updated a deck or app, and returned a concise completion summary.

items.name: claude-word-workflow
items.title: Claude Plus Word Workflow
items.description: Document drafting, review, comments, and tracked-change clips that need Claude with a Word-style editor, without browser, Finder, PowerPoint, Excel, Figma, Premiere, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.

items.name: codex-app
items.title: Codex Desktop Workbench
items.description: Desktop Codex demos that need a light-mode current app shell with real-product-like sidebar navigation, active thread, model/permission composer, toolbar controls, Git diff review pane, and local-work metadata, without importing Terminal, Claude, Finder, browser, Office, Figma, or Premiere surfaces.

items.name: codex-terminal
items.title: Codex Terminal
items.description: Command-line Codex demos, test runs, diffs, and agent execution status scenes.

items.name: excel-workbook
items.title: Excel-style Workbook
items.description: Spreadsheet analysis, formula editing, chart updates, and workbook automation scenes.

items.name: figma-editor
items.title: Figma-style Design Editor
items.description: Design handoff, frame editing, selection-handle, and Claude-to-design workflow scenes.

items.name: figma-onboarding-editor
items.title: Figma-style Onboarding Editor
items.description: Claude Code-to-design clips that need the dark onboarding design editor seen in the public reference video without importing the larger generic Figma editor shell.

items.name: finder-window
items.title: Finder Launch Deck Window
items.description: File/folder handoff scenes that need Finder without a full desktop shell.

items.name: mac-menu-bar
items.title: macOS Menu Bar
items.description: Wrapper compositions that need Mac desktop context without duplicating menu bar HTML/CSS or importing a full desktop lab.

items.name: premiere-editor
items.title: Premiere-style Video Editor
items.description: Video editing, timeline manipulation, captions, clip trimming, and review workflow scenes.

items.name: presentation-editor
items.title: PowerPoint-like Presentation Editor
items.description: Deck-editing demos and main Claude-to-PowerPoint workflow scenes.

items.name: word-editor
items.title: Word-style Document Editor
items.description: Document editing, review, comments, tracked-change, and memo workflow scenes.

items.name: quickstart-demo
items.title: UI Backlot Claude plus Browser Quickstart
items.description: Complete starter video assembling macOS menu bar, browser app, Claude chat pane, cursor, and click feedback.
